subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the Book in truth! Verily, He is the Ancient Revealer. He hath revealed the Tablet proclaiming that there is no [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الکتاب بالحق انه لهو المنزل القدیم قد انزل اللوح علی انه لا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @chastisement and requital
